1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get national 200-year flood areas (gjentaksintervall=200) from flomareal

3.description: reduce 200-year flood areas to Drammen extent

4.description: inspect teig table columns in matrikkel dataset

5.description: get parcels in Drammen larger than 5000 m2 (will use kommune number and discovered area column)

6.description: find parcels that intersect the clipped 200-year flood areas

7.description: deduplicate parcels and keep area for sorting

FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Drammen%'
LIMIT 1;

1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year flood zones clipped to Drammen bbox

3.description: get parcels in Drammen larger than 5000 m2 with geometry and area

4.description: find parcels that intersect the 200-year flood zones

5.description: one row per parcel with parcel area (m2) and identifiers
